acceptanceCriteria: CHANGELOG.md adds a '## 0.15.0 - 2026-07-13' section documenting #64 and #65 above the 0.14.0 section, with no other content changed.
dist/rigor.cjs is unchanged (no src change) and remains byte-identical to a fresh build and to .rigor/rigor-ci.cjs.
rigor release-check --version 0.15.0 passes on the merged main SHA before tagging; npm run test:all is rerun and reported in the PR.
constraints: Mechanical release change only: no source, dist, schema, workflow, .rigor, or docs edits.
Do not create keys, secrets, attestations, or GitHub configuration, and do not change any workflow permission.
